entry.title: How to change XKOMV-KHERK type from 'E' to another?
entry.content:
How to change XKOMV-KHERK type from 'E' to another?

I'm trying to change an Amount field at 

VL03N->HeaderInformation->Conditions.

I've got a condition type (ZF00 ) which calculates 2.5 % of delivery cost and add it to sum, but user didn't see the percentage at amount field.(img1)

And can't see only after doubliclicking (img2).
As i understand it deppends on XKOMV-KHERK field.

I found it in code :

Spoiler
if xkomv-kherk = 'E'.
  rv61a-zeile_leer = 'Y'.
endif.

And if the rv61a-zeile_leer is equals to 'X' 'Y' or 'Z' the programm doesn't allow to change screen.
How to change XKOMV-KHERK and save the calculation 2.5% of cost ?

entry.title: Re: ABAP-Types with class
entry.content:
@shais Ok, I was a bit unprecise there, let me rephrase it 😊

Back in my post from 04-28-2023 4:17 PM, I described the problem I'm coming from. I used the approach that is demonstrated in this blog post. But getting the domain of a variable that is defined in such way doesn't work, even if the underlying type is in fact a DDIC type.

I've prepared a code example, trying to get the domain from either help_id or get_ddic_field( 😞

Spoiler
class ycl_0000ca_rtts definition
  public final
  create public.

  public section.
    " The data element keyflag has a same-named domain with two fixed values
    types test_type1 type keyflag.
    " LVC_VALUE is based on domain text128
    types test_type2 type lvc_value.

    class-data test_variable1 type ycl_0000ca_rtts=>test_type1.
    class-data test_variable2 type ycl_0000ca_rtts=>test_type2.

    interfaces if_oo_adt_classrun.
endclass.

class ycl_0000ca_rtts implementation.
  method if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    data elemdescr type ref to cl_abap_elemdescr.

    " Test help_id for type 1:
    elemdescr ?= cl_abap_datadescr=>describe_by_data( test_variable1 ).
    out->write( |Help ID: { elemdescr->help_id } (should be keyflag)| ).
    " OK - this works because data element and domain have incidentally the same name

    " Test help_id for type 2:
    elemdescr ?= cl_abap_datadescr=>describe_by_data( test_variable2 ).
    out->write( |Help ID: { elemdescr->help_id } (should be text128)| ).

    " The following raises exception no_ddic_type
*    data(domain_name) = elemdescr->get_ddic_field( )-domname.
  endmethod.
endclass.

So whatever help_id is, it's not the domain.

And get_ddic_field( ) doesn't work, although deep down, the variable is really based on DDIC.

Probably the information gets lost, because that's how the actual types look in the debugger:

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 10
entry.content: Thanks Ajay! You're right! I'll make sure I add the link to the corresponding entry here in the future live streams so they're all immediately accessible, like here for the next one.

entry.title: Deleting of composition data after successful data upload from Intelligence authoring system
entry.content: We are sending material composition data into CG02 specification level from Intelligence authoring system which is externel system. After successful job runs, data has been adding and but after one day again composition data has been deleting from specification level. we have uploaded three times and try to check that again after some time composition data has been deleting from specification which is causing  error like no composition present  while creating Purchase orders. Please help me in this

entry.title: Multiple SAP Instance and Non-SAP Data | SAP ICMR
entry.content:
Hi, 

How can we configure ICMR in a way which involves fetching data from multiple SAP instances(for ACDOCA) as well as Non-SAP systems for Intercompany matching and reconciliation?

entry.title: Re: Introduction of Bad Debt Relief solution
entry.content:
Hi Jiri, 

I would like to ask you if such report/process is also available for pure FI module. Our customer is looking for automatic solution  but on the vendor side. They already know that  payables will not be paid in time and they are obliged to  create correction documents. 

thank you

Tomas

entry.title: My blogs show my userid instead of my name
entry.content:
My blog # https://blogs.sap.com/2023/06/03/outbound-process-from-dc-site-to-multiple-customers-in-s-4-hana-embedded-ewm-tm-asr-integration-in-ltl-shippers-scenario/ shows my userid instead of my name.

Please help.

Thanks

Prashant

entry.title: Material Sales text to Invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario- Business wants to fetch Material sales text from sales document for every material present in the invoice created for S4 HANA cloud.

Please suggest how to proceed?

Thanks and Regards,

PRI

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
As an end user who switched from a third party BI-solution to datasphere / SAC, it is good to see that planning is being addressed. I have been waiting for that. 

Datasphere is powerful and we use its functionality heavily, which is great. I cannot speak about the comparison to BW but I do expect in the future that *all* SAC functionality works with Datasphere models (or Datasphere as the source) and truly becomes a first class citizen in SAC.

Blending models and creating datasets for example.

entry.title: Re: How to add a new field to Business Volume Selection Criteria?
entry.content:
Hi @tugcezorlu , wonderful blog and well explained. May I ask you a subsequent question. I also did a similar setup for one of my customers where I could successfuly add a custom field in the business volume. We were able to create condition contract using the new field in the business volume tab, however when we run the transaction WB2R_BUSVOL to see the business volume, system gives a dump as it is not able to find the new added field. Is there any other setting that needs to be done to see the business volume based on the new field.

 

Thanks

Arpit

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
SAP Central Invoice Management is now referred as SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management.

Refer this FAQ for the typical questions on the topic.

entry.title: What functions have been improved in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Exploring Functions and Innovation in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement learning journey learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey is for business users or consultants experienced in SAP ERP Sourcing and Procurement that want to know what functions have been improved and what key innovations have been added in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement. For both SAP S/4HANA and for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

Many functions are covered, like the changes to the data model in SAP S/4HANA, new options in Sourcing and Contract Management as well as the analytical features of SAP S/4HANA.

Learning objectives

  • Get introduced to SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement
  • Execute an operational procurement process in SAP S/4HANA
  • Work with Sourcing and Contract Management in SAP S/4HANA
  • Discuss the analytical capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement
  • Learn what other Procurement-related functionality SAP S/4HANA offers

Prerequisites

  • Experience in SAP ERP Sourcing and Procurement

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: How can assign in Identity Authentication Service IAS...
entry.content:
Hi Thomas

I don't think a template is available to download. You can check the documentation for CSV file format if needed

https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-authentication/identity-authentication/import-user-groups-via-csv-file

Remember you can provision user to groups by other means. ie, via IPS you can read users/groups from a source system and provision to IAS target system.

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content:
You need to add xmlns:rfc=urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions to your Namespace Mapping in the Runtime Configuration, and declare the XML element rfc:Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response/ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE/item in your streaming configuration (notice the addition of the namespace prefix).  The converter cannot find your specified XML element because in effect it does not exist in your XML payload.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: No ABAP environments in CF space found. Check the Application Wizard console output view for details
entry.content: When trying to use trail version, getting attached error

entry.title: Re: CIAP@TDF: Baixa de fichas
entry.content:
Olá pessoal.

Pelo que entendi na criação das fichas, fica pré-determinada a quantidade de parcelas (48) para crédito, sendo possível a interrupção pelas baixas e estornos que se aplicam.

O cliente em questão afirma ter base legal para finalizar um cenário de tomada de crédito em 48 parcelas, para total restante em única parcela, ou seja, na parcela seguinte.

Até o momento eu não achei posts ou documentação SAP a respeito deste cenário.

Do lado do TDF faz sentido essa afirmação?

Se sim, como seria possível fazer?

Obrigado.

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone Single logout (SLO) for a multitenant...
entry.content:
Hi @FranciscoGarcia,

sorry for hijacking your question, but did I get you right that your SaaS Subscriber subaccount is using an IAS with OIDC protocol?

Also, for the consumer subaccount we have an IAS using OpenID Connect protocol, through which we can access the launchpad.

Is this IAS provided by a customer (so coming from a different global account) or are you providing the IAS for your customers who subscribe to your SaaS application (so it's created in the same global account, where your application is running)?
I had a discussion here, with the result that it's not possible to connect external IAS via OIDC, only via SAML protocol. That's why I'm wondering what your exact situation is.

Thanks for any feedback!
BR,
Nico

Thanks!

Mark

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: I am getting the error "Enter JSON prefix". What to put in the JSON PREFIX

entry.title: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly added acquisition value
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts

I have a question regarding the partial transfer of an asset using ABUMN.

In 2019 an asset was created (laptop).  Use life : 3 years.

In 2023 (asset is already fully depreciated – NBV = zero), a new asset was created for the replacement of this old asset.  But when posting the invoice, the old asset was used instead of the new one.  So the acquisition value on the old asset increased with the value of the new asset.  But because the initial asset was already fully depreciated, the new value did not depreciate.

Now I want to transfer the new value to the new created asset.  How can I do this (partial) transfer ?  I only want to transfer the new value to the new asset and keep the original value on the old asset.

When I try to do the partial transfer, using the new value, also a part of the accumulated deprecation will be transferred and that is not the purpose.  I only want to transfer the new acquisition value, which has not been depreciated yet.  Original acquisition value and accumulated depreciation (same amount because fully depreciated) should remain on the old asset.

Thank you for your input !  Much appreciated !

entry.title: Re: Special characters not displayed correctly in SAP BO 4.3
entry.content: Good afternoon, as you suggested, I added the NLS_LANG variable on the server, but the problem was not solved

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue

entry.title: Re: OKC9 Substitution for OBYC - DIF Transaction Key
entry.content: Hi Ajay, Can you please share you reply once again

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: @ekekakos not the Namespace Mapping in the converter, the Namespace Mapping in the Runtime Configuration of the integration flow.

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue
entry.content: Yes, I have used "*latest", version specific (online and offline) versions, but no luck.

entry.title: Re: The error in reversing entry of Asset Accounting
entry.content:
Hello,

you can reverse only the complete posting for all ledgers and not ledger dependent, and this only if the fiscal year in 0L (ended end of March) is opened in GL and AA.

As long as the alternative fiscal year is not open, you need to post an inverted posting for both ledgers.

Best,

SEvil

SAP Cloud ERP Product Management

entry.title: Customized profitability report using report painter in cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have requirement to create the profitability report in cloud, since standard Market segment actual is not serving the purpose, hence need to create the customized report using like report as below

1 Revenue

2 Sales deduction ( On invoice Discount)

3 Off Invoice Discount 

4 Gross profit = 1-2-3

5 Cogs 

6 Direct Overhead

7 Indirect Overhead

8 Net Profit  4-5-6-7

Can we achieve this any other way.

Regards,

Santhosha BH

entry.title: Unable to attach encrypted file to Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi All,

My user is trying to attach a password protected file to the billing document via Manage Billing Document and receives Error while uploading the attachment error. I have been told that password protected files are blocked for virus scanner and therefore password protected files are not allowed to be uploaded. My user was able to upload password protected file in past.

Any guidance how do we get around this?

Many thanks

Monali

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: Thank you very much for your valuable help.

entry.title: GanttCharts scrolling not working
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with my two ganttcharts. I want to  the scrolling together.

But the vertical Scrollbar does not work correctly.

In my attachment you find a screenshot of my two ganttcharts.

When I move the scrollbar 1, scrollbar 2 also moves and the both tables move too. -> that's correct! -

When I move the scrollbar 2, scrollbar 1 doesn't move, but only the first table moves. -> that's not correct!

When I move the scrollbar 3, scrollbar 4 also moves and the both gantt charts move too. -> that's correct!

When I move the scrollbar 4, scrollbar 3 also moves and the both gantt charts move too. -> that's correct!

When I move the scrollbar 5, scrollbar 6 also moves but only the first table and first ganttchart move. -> that's not correct!

When I move the scrollbar 6, scrollbar 5 also moves but only the first table and first ganttchart move . -> that's not correct!

This what I tried:

oGanttChartContainer.setEnableTimeScrollSync(true);

$(".sapUiTableHSb").on('scroll', function() {
$(".sapUiTableHSb").scrollLeft($(this).scrollLeft());
});
 
/*$(".sapUiTableHSbExternal").on('scroll', function() {
$(".sapUiTableHSbExternal").scrollLeft($(this).scrollLeft());
});
 
$(".sapUiTableVSbExternal").on('scroll', function() {
$(".sapUiTableVSbExternal").scrollTop($(this).scrollTop());
});*/
 
$(".sapUiTableVSb").on('scroll', function() {
$(".sapUiTableVSb").scrollTop($(this).scrollTop());
});

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Improvement Requests - Please Vote for your Favorites
entry.content:
There is also a SAP Influence Campaign for SAP Cloud ALM for Service
Please Refer to KBA 3391676 - SAP Continuous Influence for SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Re: Variant management & View functionality
entry.content:
Hello ghermaj,

In SAP Signavio Process Manager, process variant represent different perspectives on a main process. Our variant management tools enable process owners and modelers to identify and model variants. Please note that variant dimensions are based on dictionary categories, you first need to populate your dictionary to obtain relevant results from your variant comparison.

View creation is our tool to create a data view in a process data pipeline in Process Intelligence. Data views are virtual tables that can retrieve and join data from tables and other data views through queries that you define. Data views are similar to SQL queries used in event collectors and case attributes of business objects. 

Despite some resemblance in the results you expect. Those tools have two distinct usage for different products in SAP Siganvio Transformation Suit.

Let me know if that make things more clear or if you need further support in the product usage.

Best,

entry.title: Re: UI BubbleEvent property
entry.content:
Hi edy_simon,

Check SAP Note 1832907 for the same.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Dedicated instances in CAP project
entry.content:
If you are talking about app scale out

As far as I am aware, running multiple app copies, you have little control over. CF deals with even distribution and you do not even know which AZ they run in. They are replicated copies also, so making them different?

WRT your comment "be great to manage everything that concern one application in the same application." I would challenge that concept in a distributed environment like BTP. After all, scaling out apps  provides stability as well as performance.

I may have misread your question though.

entry.title: Re: Key User Custom Fields: When to use what type of code list
entry.content:
Dear Georg,
Thank you for your valuable pros/cons and feature matrix ! That's just what I really need to know.
May I have questions on the "Code list " option?

  1. What is the maximum record number per custom object ?
  2. Not possible to archive the old value of code list ?

Business background of my question is, my customer is thinking to implement "Code list" option for "non" static code values such as "project number" and "free-use fields per company code" which are managed outside SAP system. They want to have those values into SAP GL document line items too for analytic reporting purpose.

I understand that "Code List based on CDS View" option is better for their business requirement. In order to persuade the customer, I would like to confirm those question points above.

Thank you very much for your support.
BR, Ai

entry.title: Re: How to setup Min and Max inventory alerts setup in SA...
entry.content:
Hi,

By setting "Confirm Stock Limit Deviation" authorization, you can restrict the user by crossing the stock limits.

There is a system given alert called "Minimum Stock Deviation". You can explore that. 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Unable to attach encrypted file to Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi @Monali 

 

When uploading an attachment in S/4HANA Cloud - i know a check is made on PDF files with active content that can cause an virus scanner error .

The recommendation as outlined in the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3293784 is to Zip the file and then upload or remove the active content .

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: The power of dynamism and data reference in SAP ABAP
entry.content: @itskponline Better ask a question at Technology Q&A | SAP Community with tags SAP Process Integration/SAP Process Orchestration, rather than posting a comment in an unrelated blog post.

I even checked Administration> System Initialisation>Document Settings the setting for Response to release fo inventory below minimum level. This was setup to r "block release/receipt". 

I should get deviation alert even Im a super user correct ? 

Please suggest! Thank you

entry.title: SuccessFactor’s Story Report - stream performance data from SFSF to SFTP Servers
entry.content:
Hi all,

as we know table reports will be Deleted on November 21, 2025. We have many customers that are working with table reports and stream performance data from SFSF to SFTP Servers.

Will be in the future also an integration between story reports and HCM or what is the new way when table reports will be deleted on november 2025?

Thanks a lot and best regards

Gloria

SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics SAP SuccessFactors Compensation API Management

entry.title: Empty content in Popups (like POPUP_TO_CONFIRM) within Eclipse on MacOS
entry.content:
Hi, I use the following components:

  • Eclipse Version: 2024-03 (4.31.0)
  • ADT 3.40.2
  • SAP GUI for Java 7.80 rev 6
  • Java sapmachine-jdk-22.jdk
  • JavaFX javafx-sdk-22
  • MacOS 14.4.1 

If I run something which shows a popup in eclipse like:

call FUNCTION 'POPUP_TO_CONFIRM'
EXPORTING
text_question = 'test'.

The popup will stay empty. When I run the same without ADT/Eclipse directly in Sap GUI the text is shown.

This is the result from eclipse:

Then I run the same code directly in java gui, it works:

i have requirement to send dafault response code 200 when message received in CPI and futher flow taking time to complete further stesp and instead of waiting they wanted as soon as CPI received this default response. we have this set up in REST adapter without waiting SAP resonnse from PI we can send this.

appreciate any ideas/help.

thank you

regards,

loordh

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
1. hash: bbfffe06c588db7eade7ae1cc6330489ef2b930b92155b16d6457ee929caf5e1                   

 

 

 

 

2. The event in video is : SAP Build CodeJam

entry.title: Re: CK40N CK24 CK11N COSTING RUN
entry.content:
1) Does periodic costing run CK40N need to be performed during downtime? During the costing run, if a transaction is posted what will be the material cost?

how could you run it during downtime?

once you run ck24 the current price will be updated in the material master, accordingly any transaction will be done after that will take the new price. However, any transaction before that will take the previous price. 

2) Can costing run be done weekly, what are the complications?

I believe it can be done if needed only. Otherwise we run it periodically.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Foundry, UAA, and XSUAA | Migrating from the Neo Environment to the Multi-Cloud Foundation
entry.content: The youtube links are not wokring.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Foundry, UAA, and XSUAA | Migrating from the Neo Environment to the Multi-Cloud Foundation
entry.content: @dvankempen - The youtube videos are not working.

entry.title: Getting a clipboard alert while importing Excel files to SAP
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am currently facing this issue wherein I'm getting a clipboard alert whenever I try to import any Excel file into SAP.

Alert: "There is a large amount of information on the clipboard. Do you want to be able to paste this information into another program later?".

 
 

 

It is happening with all our users; initially this was not the case when we used to have Office 2010/2013 installed on our machines. Also, there is no information, or any data stored on Excel clipboard, we've already disabled both the office and OS clipboards but still we're getting this alert. It doesn't let us import any Excel file into SAP and there is no other error message on SAP UI except for this clipboard alert. 

Please advise.    

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: X-CSRF Token Error from Action ( POST) Runtime - SAP...
entry.content:
Hi @LUNGILEND , can please share the solution, I'm facing the same issue.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: standard raw materials import and export process in S...
entry.content:
Hi Dario,

I suggest you look at the following scope item element 

Customs Management with SAP Global Trade Services (2U1) https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402/SolP/2U1?region=DE
There are other scope items related to import and exports
 
24JCompliance Management with SAP Global Trade Services
2U1Customs Management with SAP Global Trade Services
3JXPreference Management with SAP Global Trade Services
24HTransfer of Bill of Materials for SAP Global Trade Services
24FTransfer of Contact Person for SAP Global Trade Services
1WATransfer of Primary Master Data for SAP Global Trade Services

Hope this helps,

Marco

entry.title: Re: Signavio Extraktion is giving different number of row...
entry.content:
Hello Niels

 

As far as I know this is not automatically filled. 
In order to fill this, we provide a list of all needed tables in the documentation:
https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-intelligence/accelerators/make-to-stock-in-sap-ecc?locale=en-US
--> select "Template" for your wanted process. Then you can click and copy all tables. For Make-to-Stock this is the list:
AFKO, AFPO, AUFK, AUFM, DD07T, DDFTX, JCDS, MAKT, MARA, MKPF, MSEG, T001, T001W, T023T, T134T, T156T, TJ02T, TKA01, TSPAT, VUSR02_HEADER
 
We have a Data Transformation Template and Metrics for Make-to-Stock. You can access the Data Transformation Template directly in Process Intelligence --> Process Data Management --> Process Data Pipelines --> Create --> SAP RFC --> Make-to-Stock. You can access the Metrics in a PI process --> Metrics --> Metric Library --> Filter on Process Type Make-to-Stock.
 
Let me know if this helps

entry.title: Re: standard raw materials import and export process in S...
entry.content:
Hi Dario,

I suggest you look at the following scope item element 

Customs Management with SAP Global Trade Services (2U1) https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402/SolP/2U1?region=DE
There are other scope items related to import and exports
 
24JCompliance Management with SAP Global Trade Services
2U1Customs Management with SAP Global Trade Services
3JXPreference Management with SAP Global Trade Services
24HTransfer of Bill of Materials for SAP Global Trade Services
24FTransfer of Contact Person for SAP Global Trade Services
1WATransfer of Primary Master Data for SAP Global Trade Services

Hope this helps,

Marco

entry.title: Pay statement visibility for former employees
entry.content:
Hello,

We are exploring on how we can safely enable the visibility for our former employees to view their last pay statements. Does anyone have a KBA they can share ? Also if anyone has the same requirements implemented on their SF system, can you share the best practice and any learning curve you experienced?

I appreciate it.

entry.title: Re: Connection issue between SAP MII and SAP ECC
entry.content:
Your MII and ECC is in same network? how are you passing credentials to run Transaction URL?

Regards,

Swaroop

entry.title: Re: Getting a clipboard alert while importing Excel files to SAP
entry.content: How are you importing Excel files? Some standard transaction code? Or custom program? If custom, then how is the import programmed - most likely using OLE (better to switch to ABAP2XLSX)...

entry.title: Unpack option, or unpack everything in the APP "pack outbound deliveries"
entry.content:
Hello experts.

It is not possible to use the unpack option, or unpack everything in the APP "pack outbound deliveries" app, when the work center warehouse type has mandatory HU control.

This error happens

What should I configure to be able to use HU in the work center, as this is a customer requirement?

entry.title: Re: Signavio Extraktion is giving different number of row...
entry.content:
Hi @julienmoigno ,

thanks for your answer.

I have also set up the make-to-stock process this way. But my problem is that when I run the extraction, I get back different amounts of data (rows) within half an hour with the same extraction script. I would expect this to always be the same. If the number were always increasing, you could say that new information is being added, but unfortunately it is becoming also less. I have also compared it with the data from the S4 system, unfortunately a few lines are missing.

Any ideas why this is happening?

Regards
Niels

entry.title: Re: Auto create Inbound Delivery on confirmation of Production Order
entry.content: Hi Bobby, I am trying to configure the same in my system. Please let me know the steps you have done.

entry.title: Re: Job Information to position sync ?
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is a good blog you can refer on how to enable the Position to job info sycn and vice versa. 

https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/implementing-position-management-vasanth-kumar-g-s

Refer to the section : Synchronization Between Position and Incumbent

entry.title: Where can I find learning for provisioning data to SAP HANA?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Provisioning Data to SAP HANA learning journey learning journey.

Overview
In this Learning Journey, you will learn how to provision data to the SAP HANA database from different data sources.

Learning objectives

After completing this Learning Journey, you will be able to:

  • Connect SAP HANA to SAP and non-SAP data sources
  • Access real-time data in remote tables and files without persisting the data in SAP HANA
  • Synchronize data changes between source systems and SAP HANA
  • Apply transformations on source data before loading to SAP HANA

Prerequisites

  • Essential: An understanding of database technology and terminology
  • Recommended: Basic knowledge of SAP HANA

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: SAP BYD : automatic clearing memo lines reprocessing...
entry.content:
Hello,

Depending on localization and bank statement format an identification based on Supplier Name only most likely would lead to an on-account payment.

More promising would be the 2nd approach identifying the External Down-Payment Request Invoice Reference via employing a memo-line rule of type '1 - Open Payable External Reference'.

If for example fixed characters in front of the ext. reference are conveyed a Rule Definition Mode 'Search Term' could be used; but this is subject to applied format and content.

In case the open DPR-Invoice would be unambiguously identified with matching amounts - the Outgoing Direct Debit would clear the DPR-Invoice and a Down Payment over the same amount would be created automatically.

Hope this helps,

Frank

entry.title: Re: No ABAP environments in CF space found. Check the App...
entry.content: Yes.i have it activated

entry.title: Re: External API / Web Service integration with SAP Digital Manufacturing - Demystified!
entry.content:
Hi Yash,

Is your destination reachable from BTP?

entry.title: Re: Getting a clipboard alert while importing Excel files...
entry.content: Did you already read How to programmatically turn off the Clipboard warning message ?

entry.title: Re: Error 403 when calling Process Automation API on depl...
entry.content:
Hey guys,

we could solve it. The problem was my destination path.
I've set the complete URL to the API Endpoint, which caused this error.

To solve this issue, just set the url without the path - like that:
https://<host>.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com

and in sap build apps (DATA -> API), set the path after the Domain:

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning - Converting data
entry.content:
Use case A: converting Local currency to Group currency within one Version 

Two options are available:

  1. based on Calculation measures performed on the fly in the story,
  2. based on Calculated measures by data actions, here the end user needs to run the data action to get the result of the currency conversion.

Configuration of the option 1 Calculation measures 

In our example, the end user wants to convert the Local Currency measure to two different Measures converted at two different rates: Official and Second market.

Create in the planning model one measure for Local Currency and two different Conversions measures with the Local Currency measure as source and convert each of them to the expected conversion rate.

Local Currency measure 

Group Currency in Euros converted to the Official Market Rate

Group Currency in Euros converted to the Second Market Rate

Currency conversion table 

Result in the story

 

 

Configuration of the option 2 Calculated measures 

Create in the model three measures:  the Local Currency,  the second, converted to the Official Rate and the third, converted to the second Market Rate.

Create a data action per conversion rate in using the Currency Conversion Step feature 

Currency conversion step at Official Rate

Currency conversion step at Second Market Rate

Result in the story once the data actions have been run by the end user.

What are the differences between both options ? 

In the first option, the result is immediate but consumes memory, so if you have other calculations on the fly in the story, the end user might have to wait or even to experience performances issues.

In the second option, the end user triggers the data actions to get the result of measures that are calculated in the back end, the result is stored in the database and can be easily recalled in other stories whereas in the first option the calculation measures need to the calculated on the fly in every story. 

Use case B: use different versions to store and analyze the effects of exchanges rates modifications

In this example, we calculate the currency effects at constant exchange rates for the Budget in applying the Actual rates to the Budget data.

My methodological preference goes to the creation of another Version of the Budget, to duplicate its data and to convert the copied data to the Actual exchange rate, then to compare both Versions (Budget at Budget rate against Budget at Actual rate) to get the currency effects at constant exchange rates.

Of course, the methodology proposed in the use case A, using different measures within one Version and comparing them by difference, is appliable, but as soon as your have multiple types of measures converted to different type of rate (average, closing, opening, etc..) and multiple currency targets, this increases the number of measures and questions again how to configure and to store the calculations.

On the fly or per data action or both? 🙂 

Configuration

Create a Group Currency conversion measure 

 

Create two different Budget versions

Budget version at Budget rate

Budget version at Actual Rate version

Result in the story

To calculate the currency effect, we added a column subtracting amounts of both Budget versions

Use case C: data collection based on transaction currencies 

This use case is more sophisticated and requires from the end users detailed information per Transaction Currency complementary to the Local Currency.

Create a transaction Currency dimension

In this type of configuration, the model needs to be enhanced with another dimension "Transaction currency"

with a the property "Currency" in order to get the currency conversion effective. 

Create a Transaction Currency measure 

Create a Conversion Measure (to Group Currency)

The Conversion Measure is based on the Source measure "Transaction Currency" (previously created).

Result in the story 

The first Currency column indicates the Local Currency of the Business Unit of the Organisation dimension, then the dimension Transaction Currency details the split of the Revenue per transaction currency.

The conversion in this use case is based on the data input per Transaction Currency. 

Hope this helps 🙂 

Charlotte

For more sophisticated scenario SAP Analytics Cloud Planning - New model and conve... - SAP Community

Avoid performances issues SAP Analytics Cloud Planning - New model and conve... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: How to check ATP results for multiple items on one sc...
entry.content:
Hi @csjung ,

afaik there is no option to check multiple articles at once similar like you can do it for one in CO09. Usually you need to build a wrapper report around the respective BAPI which returns ATP results to achieve this. However this is most likely not possible in your cloud based system.

BR, Peter

entry.title: Re: ABAP-Types with class
entry.content:
@JaschaS ,
Oh, I see.
Basically this is because the help ID returns the data element and not the domain (or the table field in case you have used a table field reference in your type definition. e.g. VBAK-VBELN).

Anyway, the following code should do the trick:

 

elemdescr ?= cl_abap_datadescr=>describe_by_data( test_variable2 ).
if elemdescr->help_id is not INITIAL.
  elemdescr ?= cl_abap_datadescr=>describe_by_name( elemdescr->help_id ).
  domname = elemdescr->get_ddic_field( )-domname.
endif.

entry.title: SAP MDG BP SOA - No confirmation message available when creating change request
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on an inbound MDG SOA interface to replicate Business Partner(Customer Master) from Salesforce (sender system) to SAP MDG (receiving system) via middleware. This interface is being built to create a CR in MDG to create/update Business Partner - Customer.
We are using SOAP API service for Inbound - BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In.

The business Requirement is to send a response/confirmation message (via web service) to the sender system to inform whether CR creation was successful or failed with errors (including the error messages).

The standard Confirmation message is not triggering for MDG CR creation via BP SOAP inbound request. We tried to use BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out.

From SAP Note 2942297 we understand that the Confirmation message is not sent when creating a CR (staging area), instead, it is only sent when saving BP directly to the active area.

Regarding SAP Note 2847807 -  SAP has strictly advised not to use class CL_MDG_BP_BUPA_SI_IN and its method IF_MDG_UPLOAD_PROXY~SETUP_FOR_FILE_UPLOAD. Any invalid usage of this method creates inconsistent Change Requests and thus severe issues for your master data.

What other feasible solution options can you suggest for us to send back the confirmation message when creating MDG CRs?

If someone has implemented any such solution for a similar requirement, we'd appreciate your help a great deal.

Thank you in advance,

entry.title: Re: National Pet Day! Post your pet!
entry.content:
This is Bolt. He loves going on hikes through the rainforest

It's pretty hot out there, but he cools off by splashing around in the rivers

entry.title: Re: How to dynamically pass parameters to SimbaDSN in code
entry.content:
Is there a JDBC driver available? If so, you could use that and configure the key file path as part of that connection string. That's the only way I can think of to be able to pass that value.  You can't use a parameter to pass information like this to the connection.

Also, just because you have a working connection does not mean that SAP will actually support connecting to that type of database.  If it's not in the Data Sources documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/link-disclaimer?site=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.cdn.sap.com%2Ftools%2Fsap-cr-2020-supported-platforms-windows.zip) then it's not officially supported.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: Latest Goal Management - Display the matrix reports i...
entry.content: It works great, thank you!

entry.title: Re: Are UI Facets and fieldgroups available for abstract...
entry.content:
I have the same question - does anyone know if this could work?
Here is my example approach, that doesn't work.

 

define abstract entity ZTEST_ABSTRACT_ENTITY
{  
  @UI.facet: [
                {
                      id: 'GENERAL',
                      type: #COLLECTION,                      
                      position: 10,                      
                      label: 'General'
                  },  
                
                {
                      purpose: #STANDARD,
                      type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
                      importance: #HIGH,
                      position: 10,
                      targetQualifier: 'FGROUP10',
                      label: 'Field Group I',
                      parentId: 'GENERAL'
                  },
                  
                {
                      purpose: #STANDARD,
                      type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
                      importance: #HIGH,
                      position: 20,
                      targetQualifier: 'FGROUP20',
                      label: 'Field Group II',
                      parentId: 'GENERAL'
                  }                    
    ]  
    
    @UI.fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'FGROUP10',position: 100 }]
    Field1: char25;
    @UI.fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'FGROUP10',position: 200 }]
    Field2: char25;
    @UI.fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'FGROUP10',position: 300 }]
    Field3: char25;
    
    @UI.fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'FGROUP20',position: 100 }]
    Field4: char25;
    @UI.fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'FGROUP20',position: 200 }]
    Field5: char25;
    @UI.fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'FGROUP20',position: 300 }]
    Field6: char25;   

}d

Who can help me?

entry.title: SAP IBP Excel logon - WebView issue / long waiting time till login
entry.content:
Hi community,

since a couple of days we are facing SAP IBP login issues w/in the MS Excel add-in. Usually it does not happen at the beginning of a working day with a freshly opened Excel. However it happens for multiple users after a couple of hours. This can be after auto logout or switching between IBP backend system connections. We observed two different issues related to the login prompt:

  1. The login prompt takes quite long until it has been fully loaded, i.e. one can enter the user credentials
  2. The login prompt starts flickering for round about 10-15s until the error message "Cannot access a disposed object. Object name: 'webView'."

     

The MS Edge WebView 2 Runtime Environment version is 123.0.2420.81 and should be the most recent one. Also the IBP Excel Add-in version 2402.03. is pretty much up to date.

Unfortunately it can't be reproduced on demand.
Does anyone else face similar issues?

BR, Peter

entry.title: Re: 🇱🇹 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python (Vilnius, LT)
entry.content: Hi. I take it that all places for this event have already run out, have they not?

entry.title: Configuration Log maintenance

Please can share the best practises you follow to maintain log of configuration changes? Is there something within the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that we can utilize or do you use other tools/spreadsheet?

Monali

entry.content: What is your logic that will determine when to enable / disable the save button in the section header?

entry.title: Re: Ess-EHP5 How to set mandatory the "Note" field into l...
entry.content:
Hello ,
You can achieve it writing a validation code in  method of  odata service 

HCMFAB_LEAVE_REQUEST_CR_SRV 

Writing code in this according to your requirement will give you a message box saying new note is mandatory.

Also create your own message class.

entry.title: Re: BEx Explorer(Analyzer) can't start in win 10
entry.content:
Per SAP Note 722513 - Desktop Office Integration: Maintenance information

722513 - Desktop Office Integration: Maintenance information - SAP for Me

Microsoft Office 2019 / Visio 2019

Microsoft Office 2019 and Microsoft Visio 2019 are supported as of SAP GUI for Windows 7.50 Patch Level 8 (and as of SAP GUI for Windows 7.60).

Note that this statement refers only to the SAP Desktop Office Integration that is a part of SAP GUI for Windows. Other SAP technologies that interact with Microsoft Office perform their own releases for Office 2019.

So you should be OK. From the Windows Start Menu -> SAP Business Intelligence and open there. But you are using really old versions on Windows 10. Consider upgraing MS Office and SAP GUI. 

John Hawk

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Launchpad App Manager Tool Available for SAP S/4HANA 2020
entry.content:
Hello,

as far as I know apps should only exist once in a technical catalog, but might be referenced several times in a business catalog.  Business catalogs can include references to SAP and custom apps.

Best regards, Katja

entry.content:
Hi everyone.
I created a story using the grid option. Inserted my required calculations. Outside the grid I can enter comments in cells and other values. However, in a column outside the grid I need to perform sum function for any value I enter.
In the attached image, I need a total for the circled values. I have tried it but it does not work. Any suggestions?
Thanks

need to missuse AfO due to a rather complex, denormalizeing Query.

Want to display, print, Lines (Charachters) in an AfO Cell.
Should look like this -> inside the green lassoes:

How to manage this in Eclipse Query builder ?

ThankXs.

Martin

entry.title: Problem with Action with uploaded API specification for output
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use an Action in SAP Build Process Automation. The Action should simply get the purchase order items from the standard API from a SAP system. First of all, I tried get the API specification through SBPA through the Business Accellerator Hub. The output though, was in the wrong format... it was showing a json forma like { "value": [ {..}]} which did not looked like the response which I should get like I received in Postman. Also the test failed with this kind of output format. 

Then I tried to create a custom Action and configured the standard purchase order API by myself and I uploaded the API specification from the edx file from the Business Accelerator hub. The test of the Action worked and I received the expected output as follows { "d": "results": [{..}]}.

After that, I would like to use the Action within my Automation.

Now comes my problem. For somehow, I am not able to use the output variable of the Action in further functions or even simply in a log message. I always displays the following error:

Log message: The parameter "message" refers to an object that doesn't exist. Please clicke the parameter to change it. Type not found for variable ...

I hope someone can help me out, what I might have configured incorrectly. 

Kind regards,

Markus

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: SAP Datasphere : データアクセス制御 (行レベルセキュリティ)
entry.content:
本ブログでは、SAP Datasphere( 以下、「Datasphere」) のデータアクセス制御について解説します。

Datasphere のデータ(テーブルやビューなど)へのアクセス制御は、基本的にスペース単位でオブジェクトを管理して、そのスペースにユーザを追加 (厳密にはロールを付与)します。

ただし、スペース単位ではなく、データの内容によってアクセス制御を行いたいケースがあります。いわゆる「行(レコード)レベルのアクセス制御」です。

例えば、図のようにKABATA さんには、全地域の売上ではなく、アジア地域の売上データのみアクセスさせたいケースなどです。

このようなアクセス制御を実装するために、「権限テーブル」を利用することによって、ユーザー毎に参照できるデータ定義し、きめ細やかなアクセス制御を行うことが可能です。

この「権限テーブル」のデータをメンテナンスすることにより、スキーマ構造やレポート、アプリケーションを変更する必要がないので、運用上もメンテナンス作業負荷が軽減する可能性があります。

アクセス制御を実装する際には、その設定はトランザクションデータに対してではなく、マスターデータに対して実装した方が効率的で、アクセス管理も容易になります。

今回の例では「顧客マスターディメンションビュー」に対して「地域アクセス権限テーブル」を関連付ける方法を例にその設定方法について解説します。

データアクセス制御の設定の流れは下記の通りです。

1. 権限テーブルの作成

2. アクセス制御定義の作成 (権限テーブルの結合キー列の指定)

3. 権限テーブルとディメンションの関連付け

今回は下記のブログで作成したディメンションビューを利用して、KABATAさんが「アジア地域」のみアクセス可能なデータアクセス制御を実装します。

はじめてのSAP Datasphere : モデリング

また、設定にあたっては下記のマニュアルも参考にしてください。

"単一値" データアクセス制御の作成

 

1. 権限テーブルの作成

まず、権限テーブルを作成します。

 

こちらのサイトからCSVファイルをダウンロードしてください。

P_REGIONO.csv : 地域アクセス権限テーブル用のデータ

ダウンロードしたCSVファイルを利用してデータを修正します。特定の列の値に対して、ご自身のメールアドレス(Datasphere のログインID)に修正してください。

例では、「xxxxxxxxkabata@sap.com」ユーザが「地域 ID: 5 (Asia PAC)」のみアクセス可能な権限データに修正しています。

※ 地域IDの意味が分かり易いように、地域名もテーブルに含めています。

それでは、CSVデータを元にデータをアップロードして権限テーブルを作成します。

データビルダでCSVファイルをインポートします。

 

先程ダウンロードしたCSVファイルを選択し、デプロイします。

 

テーブル名には任意のビジネス名と技術名を付けます。

 

2. アクセス制御定義の作成 

作成した「権限テーブル」に対して、「アクセス制御の定義情報」を追加します。

左メニューの「データアクセス制御」を選択し、「新規データアクセス制御」をクリックします。

 

データアクセス定義情報に任意のビジネス名、技術名を付けて、「構造」には「単一値」を指定します。

続いて「権限エンティティ」フィールドをクリックして、先ほど作成した権限テーブル「地域 (権限テーブル) 」を選択します。

 

 

 続いて「ID列」には「ログインユーザー名」が格納されている列を選択します。

 

続いて、「顧客マスターディメンションビュー」と関連付ける列、今回は「REGIONID(地域ID)列」の指定を行います。

※ 図は簡略化しています

設定が終わったら、「保存」ボタン、「デプロイ」ボタンの順番にクリックし、設定を有効化します。

 

 

3. 権限テーブルとディメンションの関連付け

左メニューの「データビルダ」から 顧客マスターディメンションビューを選択します。

 

プロパティの設定画面から「データアクセス制御制限」 の「＋」ボタンをクリックします。

 

ここでは先ほど作成した「地域のデータアクセス制御」の定義情報を選択します。

 

続いて、顧客マスターディメンションと権限テーブル(アクセス制御の情報)を関連付けます。

「顧客マスターディメンションビュー」の「地域ID」列を「アクセス制御情報」の「REGIONID」列に対してDrag & Dropします。

 

関連付けされて、「顧客マスタディメンションビュー」の「データビューア」を確認すると、権限テーブルの「REGIONID」列に設定されている値の「5 (Asia PAC)」のデータしか参照できないことが確認できます。

 

確認後、「保存」ボタン、「デプロイ」ボタンの順番にクリックし、ディメンションビューを有効化します。

 

4. アクセス制御の確認

それではSAP Analytics Cloud のストーリーで前回作成したグラフを使ってデータを参照してみましょう。

アクセスすると地域は「Asia PAC (アジアパシフィック) 」の売上データしか参照できないことが確認できたかと思います。

 

設定は以上です。

entry.title: Re: Firebase legacy Cloud Messaging API will be discontinued
entry.content:
Hello,

The note is now available https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3434341.

Best Regards, Isabelle

entry.title: Re: Quota Arrangement in Make To Order Scenario
entry.content:
Hello

In the lot-sizing procedure customizing (OMI4), make sure that the setting Lot Size MTO is set to 2 Lot size as in short-term period, and make sure that splitting quota is set.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: How to set the accurate notifications/Alerts in SLT?
entry.content:
Hi Raj,

There isn't a better solution within the standard functionality of the product.

However through the function modules found in function group IUUC_REPL_API (found in transaction SE80), you may be able to create custom notifications/alerts that better suit your requirements.

Example function modules for this:

  • IUUC_REPL_COUNT_UNPROC_LOGRECS
  • IUUC_REPL_GET_OLDEST_LOG_TSTMP
  • IUUC_REPL_GET_TABLE_LATENCY

Regards,
Ian
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Where in S4H enter the old number from legacy ERP?
entry.content:
Hi,

If you want to do Plant specific, then you can go with Custom field in Plant Data view of MM. May be the below link help you.

Additional Fields on the Material Master - SAP Community

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Career Corner Partner Chat with ADventas
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Today I’m very excited to share with you this partner chat I participated in a couple of months ago.

Together with Joshua Margo from SAP we discussed how to become a business consultant, especially for SAP GTM. I shared some general information about my company ADventas as well as some details on our onboarding process.  You can view the current ADventas job opportunity here.

You can find the partner chat episodes (2 parts) here:

Career Corner Partner Chat - Episode 1: ADventas (Part 1)

Career Corner Partner Chat - Episode 1: ADventas (Part 2)

In the interview we spoke about the following topics:

(Part 1)

  1. Tell us a little bit about yourself, your career path and how you came to work at ADventas?
  2. What are the current goals for ADventas?
  3. What does the right candidate look like and what are you willing to train for?
  4. How many customers are using Global Trade Management presently?
  5. Where is your company based and where are your customers located?

(Part 2)

  1. Where do you prefer your employees be located?
  2. How do you onboard new employees?
  3. What's different about working at ADventas as compared to anywhere else you have worked?
  4. How do you build trust among employees at ADventas?
  5. How many employees are currently at ADventas?
  6. If I do not fit all of the requirements, should I still apply for a position at ADventas?
  7. What are the common career paths at ADventas?
  8. Any parting words of advice for those interested in a career as a SAP consultant?

Please tune in if you’re interested. I’m looking forward to your thoughts and comments.

All the best,

Peter
